content.text:
I can see your conversation history from our current session. Here are your last 3 prompts:

1. **"exit"** - You asked to exit the service
2. **"Show me my recent bills"** - You requested to see your recent billing history
3. **"Get my customer information"** - You asked me to retrieve your customer account details

Is there anything specific about these requests that you'd like me to help clarify or follow up on?
